nasb.text: and spare my father and my mother and my brothers and my sisters, with all who belong to them, and deliver our lives from death.”

esv.text: that you will save alive my father and mother, my brothers and sisters, and all who belong to them, and deliver our lives from death.”

cnv.text: 放過我的父母、兄弟姊妹和他們所有的一切，救我們的命不致死亡。”

ccb.text: 保证让我的父母、兄弟、姐妹和他们所有的亲人免于一死。”
